title: Puma India is Hiring: E-commerce Executive (Junior)

jsonLd.title: Puma India is Hiring: E-commerce Executive (Junior)
jsonLd.description:
Grow your career with Puma India! We are hiring a E-commerce Executive for our Amritsar team. Be part of a workplace that celebrates innovation, diversity, and performance.

About Puma India:
Puma India is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Analyze sales data and customer behavior to drive revenue growth
• Conduct competitor analysis and market benchmarking
• Collaborate with logistics partners to ensure timely delivery
• Track key performance indicators including GMV, conversion rate, and ROI
• Manage marketplace relationships with Amazon, Flipkart, and Meesho
• Execute digital marketing campaigns across Google, Meta, and other channels
• Manage product listings, pricing, and promotions on the platform

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• BPharm / MPharm / PharmD
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Performance Marketing
• Proficiency in Email Marketing
• Proficiency in Customer Segmentation
• Proficiency in Affiliate Marketing
• Proficiency in A/B Testing
• Proficiency in Product Management
• Proficiency in Supply Chain
• Proficiency in CRM Software

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Professional development and training programs
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Learning & development budget
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Amritsar, Punjab, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Puma India!
